html:
GenericStage 1Stage 2Stage 3

“Used by Wendy to call her Ghostly sister Abigail.”

-

Abigail's Flower is a character-specific item used by Wendy to summon the ghost of her twin sister, Abigail. To do so, players have to use the flower in the Inventory without any other conditions, causing Wendy to gain 15 . Wendy can also use Abigail's Flower on Abigail to desummon her and to lose 15 .

Abigail's Flower can be crafted from 1 Mourning Glory and 1 Nightmare Fuel in the Survivor Items Filter and Magic Filter.

Wendy can ask Abigail to stay close to her or roam more free via Abigail's Flower. In the "Sooth" state, Abigail follows Wendy and will attack Mobs that either attack Wendy or that Wendy herself attacks. In the "Rile Up" state, Abigail attacks every Mob close to Wendy, be it enemy or neutral.

If there are multiple Abigail's Flowers at the same time, they all behave the same. The flower has 4 blooming stages. The first stage is obtained when Wendy is far from Abigail's Flower, on the ground, or in other player inventory. The second, third, and fourth stages are linked to the maximum health of Abigail.

  • Unsummon
  • Rile Up
  • Soothe
  • Attack At
  • Scare
  • Haunt At
  • Escape

Trivia

  • There is a Forge exclusive profile icon depicting Abigail's Flower. According to the icon's flavor text, this flower is Wendy's only remaining keepsake of Abigail.
  • In the animated short Next of Kin, a picture of Abigail's Flower can be seen pinned on a board that connects various people, places, and events to Charlie's disappearance.
  • Prior to Wendy's character refresh, Abigail's Flower could be crafted for 6 Petals and 1 Nightmare Fuel in Don't Starve Together.
  • Prior to Wendy's character refresh, Abigail's Flower could turn into a normal flower or petal (depending on turf/tiles) if left on the ground for 1440 seconds (3 days).
  • Abigail's Flower can be found in Terraria as a weapon added as part of the Terraria x Don't Starve Together crossover update.

Gallery

  • Unused Abigail's Flower inventory icon.
  • Abigail's expression when low on health.
  • Abigail's Flower's stages in Don't Starve Together.
  • An Abigail's Flower accessory included with the Abigail special edition Blind Box Figure.
  • A picture of Abigail's Flower from the Next of Kin animated short.
  • Abigail's Flower as seen in the poster for the Strange New Powers update.
  • Abigail's Flower as seen on the 2017 Valentine Cards.
  • Abigail's Flower in a promotional image for Wendy's character update.
  • Abigail's Flower in Terraria

GenericStage 1Stage 2Stage 3
“It's hauntingly beautiful.”
–Wilson
“Looks flammable.”
–Willow
“Is pretty.”
–Wolfgang
“It's still so pretty.”
–Wendy
“FEEBLE PLANTLIFE”
–WX-78
“Ah... I'm not familiar with this strain of flower.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's a flower? I guess.”
–Woodie
“Hm? What a familiar presence.”
–Maxwell
“För me?”
–Wigfrid
“Pretty petals!”
–Webber
“I don't think it's edible.”
–Warly
“Friend?”
–Wormwood
“What a nice little flower.”
–Winona
“I think it eats souls, too.”
–Wortox
“It not quite as ugly as most flowers.”
–Wurt
“Did that flower just whisper something?”
–Walter
“There's something about that flower...”
–Wanda
“Do you need some alone time?”
–Wilson
“Ugh, it's weird!”
–Willow
“Little flower gives Wolfgang the "heebie jeebies".”
–Wolfgang
“It was my sister's flower. She's gone far away.”
–Wendy
“IT IS CREEPY”
–WX-78
“It's emitting a strange energy.”
–Wickerbottom
“That flower's lookin' a bit run down.”
–Woodie
“I can sense strong magic within it.”
–Maxwell
“My warriör's sense tells me it's nöt tö be trifled with.”
–Wigfrid
“Can she hear us in there?”
–Webber
“Something's stirring inside.”
–Warly
“Hello there!”
–Wormwood
“Looks like someone needed a break.”
–Winona
“No need to hide from me... tasty as you might be.”
–Wortox
“Abby-gill hiding.”
–Wurt
“Oh, Abigail! I didn't recognize you.”
–Walter
“There's something about that flower...”
–Wanda
“I think she's starting to open up to us.”
–Wilson
“Burning is still an option.”
–Willow
“I do not like.”
–Wolfgang
“I can sense Abigail's spirit growing stronger.”
–Wendy
“IT IS STILL CREEPY”
–WX-78
“That flower has perked up quite a bit.”
–Wickerbottom
“A haunted flower... pretty strange don't ya think, Lucy?”
–Woodie
“A powerful bond tethers this spirit to our world.”
–Maxwell
“It's gathering its strength.”
–Wigfrid
“C'mon Abigail, Wendy misses you!”
–Webber
“Bonjour? Anyone there?”
–Warly
“Growing”
–Wormwood
“Up'n'attem! The day's a-wasting!”
–Winona
“How are you doing in there?”
–Wortox
“She sure taking her time, flort.”
–Wurt
“Don't eat the haunted flower, Woby!”
–Walter
“There's energy building around it.”
–Wanda
“Looks like someone's feeling especially spirited today!”
–Wilson
“Yeah sure, it's floating now, why not.”
–Willow
“Is making Wolfgang scared!”
–Wolfgang
“Abigail! Are you ready to play?”
–Wendy
“ACTUALLY, IT'S NOT SO BAD NOW”
–WX-78
“Its magic has reached maximum potency.”
–Wickerbottom
“I guess I should be used to weird stuff by now.”
–Woodie
“...I wonder how my brother is doing.”
–Maxwell
“What strange magic!”
–Wigfrid
“Helloooo? Do you want to come out now?”
–Webber
“Ah, you are looking quite well today little flower!”
–Warly
“Floaty friend!”
–Wormwood
“That flower looks raring to go.”
–Winona
“My, you're looking spirited! Hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Come out!”
–Wurt
“You're not really as spooky when you're a flower.”
–Walter
“Something's about to happen!”
–Wanda
“Used by Wendy to call her Ghostly sister Abigail.”

Trivia[edit | edit source]
There is a Forge exclusive profile icon depicting Abigail's Flower. According to the icon's flavor text, this flower is Wendy's only remaining keepsake of Abigail.
In the animated short Next of Kin, a picture of Abigail's Flower can be seen pinned on a board that connects various people, places, and events to Charlie's disappearance.
Prior to Wendy's character refresh, Abigail's Flower could be crafted for 6 Petals and 1 Nightmare Fuel in Don't Starve Together.
Prior to Wendy's character refresh, Abigail's Flower could turn into a normal flower or petal (depending on turf/tiles) if left on the ground for 1440 seconds (3 days).
Abigail's Flower can be found in Terraria as a weapon added as part of the Terraria x Don't Starve Together crossover update.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Bông hoa của Abigail là một vật phẩm dành riêng cho nhân vật được Wendy sử dụng để triệu hồi hồn ma của người chị song sinh của cô, Abigail. Để làm được như vậy, người chơi phải sử dụng bông hoa trong Kho đồ mà không kèm theo bất kỳ điều kiện nào khác, khiến Wendy nhận được 15. Wendy cũng có thể sử dụng Abigail's Flower lên Abigail để triệu hồi cô ấy và để mất 15 .

According to the icon's flavor text, this flower is Wendy's only remaining keepsake of Abigail. * In the animated short ''Next of Kin'', a picture of Abigail's Flower can be seen pinned on a board that connects various people, places, and events to Charlie's disappearance. * Prior to Wendy's character refresh, Abigail's Flower could be crafted for 6 [[Petals]] and 1 [[Nightmare Fuel]] in ''Don't Starve Together''. * Prior to Wendy's character refresh, Abigail's Flower could turn into a normal flower or petal (depending on turf/tiles) if left on the ground for 1440 seconds (3 days). * Abigail's Flower can be found in ''Terraria'' as [[wgg:terraria:Abigail%27s_Flower|a weapon]] added as part of the ''Terraria'' x ''Don't Starve Together'' crossover update. =={{Pic|32|Blueprint}} Gallery == Abigail's Flower Stage 0.png|Unused Abigail's Flower inventory icon.
